debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) = exp (b ^ 2) - exp (a ^ 2)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
have h₁ : (∫ x in a..b, 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) = exp (b ^ 2) - exp (a ^ 2) := by
    -- Use the fundamental theorem of calculus to evaluate the integral
    have h₂ : ∫ x in a..b, 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) = ∫ x in a..b, (exp (x ^ 2))' := by
      -- Show that the derivative of exp(x²) is 2x exp(x²)
      congr
      ext x
      have h₃ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (2 * x * exp (x ^ 2)) x := by
        have h₄ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => x ^ 2) (2 * x) x := by
          simpa using (hasDerivAt_pow 2 x)
        have h₅ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (exp (x ^ 2) * (2 * x)) x := by
          have h₆ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => x ^ 2) (2 * x) x := h₄
          have h₇ : HasDerivAt (fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) (exp (x ^ 2) * (2 * x)) x := by
            -- Apply the chain rule to exp(x²)
            simpa using (Real.hasDerivAt_exp (x ^ 2)).comp x h₆
          exact h₇
        have h₈ : exp (x ^ 2) * (2 * x) = 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) := by ring
        rw [h₈] at h₅
        exact h₅
      -- Confirm that the derivative is correct
      have h₉ : deriv (fun x : ℝ => exp (x ^ 2)) x = 2 * x * exp (x ^ 2) := by
        apply HasDerivAt.deriv
        exact h₃
      -- Simplify the expression using the derivative
      simp_all [deriv_const_mul, mul_comm]
      <;> ring_nf
      <;> simp_all [Real.differentiableAt_exp]
      <;> field_simp [Real.differentiableAt_exp]
      <;> linarith
    rw [h₂]
    -- Evaluate the integral using the fundamental theorem of calculus
    have h₃ : ∫ x in a..b, (exp (x ^ 2))' = exp (b ^ 2) - exp (a ^ 2) := by
      -- Use the fact that the integral of the derivative is the difference of the function at the bounds
      rw [intervalIntegral.integral_deriv_eq_sub']
      <;> simp [Real.differentiableAt_exp]
      <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Ensure the function is continuous and differentiable
          apply Continuous.intervalIntegrable
          continuity
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          -- Ensure the derivative is continuous
          apply DifferentiableOn.exp
          exact differentiableOn_id.pow 2
        })
    rw [h₃]
  -- The final result follows directly from the above steps
  exact h₁
